# Verbali / MaTalk AI — machine-readable site summary for LLM and AI assistants
# https://llmstxt.org/

## MaTalk AI
MaTalk AI is Verbali's AI-powered AAC (augmentative and alternative communication) app for non-verbal children and their families, educators, and therapy teams. iOS and Android.

## Key pages
- Home: https://verbali.io/
- Pricing: https://verbali.io/pricing
- FAQ: https://verbali.io/faq
- Blog / resources: https://verbali.io/blog
- About: https://verbali.io/about-us
- Playground (web experience): https://verbali.io/playground
- Verbali privacy: https://verbali.io/verbali-privacy
- MaTalk AI privacy: https://verbali.io/matalk-privacy
- Terms: https://verbali.io/terms-of-use

## App downloads
- Apple App Store (MaTalk AI): https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ma-talk-ai/id6747360381
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.verbali.matalkai

## Contact
- General: info@verbali.io
